---
title: "Download and wrangle hydrodynamic data"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
authors: Michelle Stern and Nick Rowlands
---
Variables from SCHISM: water temperature, flow, turbidity, salinity, residence time (average for a certain month? season?) how to get an index for stratification, light? Variables from climate datasets: wind, solar radiation (also when?) Flow at certain gages? satellite data? Non time-variant variables?

# Download data

```{r}
# Required packages to include
# install.packages("librarian")
librarian::shelf(readr, dplyr, tidyr, here, leaflet, sf, ggplot2, ggspatial, prettymapr, sharpshootR, purrr, tibble, ckanr, lubridate)
```

![[SCHISM boundary conditions](https://cadwrdeltamodeling.github.io/BayDeltaSCHISM/topics/baydelta_boundaries.html)](https://cadwrdeltamodeling.github.io/BayDeltaSCHISM/_images/open_boundaries.png){width="80%"}

```{r}
# SCHISM data

```
